messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: API responses slow and hitting rate limits

Our nightly sync script pulls a few thousand tasks through the API. Lately each request takes 2-3 seconds and we hit the rate limit halfway through. Is there a recommended batch endpoint?

response.content: {"category":"performance","priority":"medium","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about performance — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
